patch.value: health.ts re-implements doctor.ts capability-guidance helpers verbatim instead of importing the exported versions

src/cli/commands/health.ts:165-200 contains private copies of collectUnknownCapabilityGuidance + buildCapabilityContractMetadata + the layer-prefix helper that are EXPORTED (identical, byte-for-byte for the function bodies) from src/cli/commands/extension/doctor.ts:530-565. health already imports from several command modules, so importing from extension/doctor.js (or moving the trio to a shared src/cli/commands/extension/capability-guidance.ts) removes ~60 duplicated lines and a drift hazard (capability contract metadata diverging between pm health and pm extension doctor). Not caught by the static gate because its duplicate-chunk scope is limited to src/core/ + src/sdk/ (scripts/release/static-quality-gate.mjs:346-349).
